title: Elon Open Data Service (ODS)
description: Built an API for students at Elon that extracts data from university servers including class schedules, building hours, and dining hall menus. Created a design document outlining API endpoints and system architecture. Implemented SAML authentication and cookie-based user verification.

title: KiddyKam @ PennApps
description: Developed a project for the PennApps hackathon focused on building a functional prototype under time constraints. Contributed to core application logic and team collaboration.

title: HerdsWallet @ HackaBull
description: Created the concept for a financial tracking app and worked with a team of four to build it in 36 hours at the 2023 HackaBull Hackathon. Built the front-end using JavaScript and TypeScript, assisted with backend routing, and helped integrate MongoDB.

title: ZenZone @ PhillyCodefest
description: Designed and built a guided meditation app with a team of four in 48 hours. Developed the backend in Java, assisted with frontend routing, and helped integrate MongoDB into the backend.

title: Ranked Choice Voting
description: Implemented a ranked-choice voting system in Java as part of a Computer Science 2 course. Simulates the voting process to demonstrate a more representative election model where voters rank candidates by preference.
